title: Week 7 Review
html:
Week 7 Review

Congratulations on completing week seven! After finishing your lessons you should now know:

  • 9 new Kanji 時, 分, 半, 国, 火, 水, 金, 土, 年
  • 12 new words in katakana
  • How to express a list of actions, give instructions and opinions
  • How to make verbs in ないform and plain form
  • How to use までに, から, けど and the adverbs かならず and ぜんぶ
  • How to use these 6 new grammar points:
    • Grammar focus on たform＋あとで（after~; later)
    • Grammar focus on ないでください (please do not do)
    • Grammar focus on the use of まだ＋Verb＋ないでください (please do not do it yet)
    • Grammar focus on なければなりません (have to, must)
    • Grammar focus on なくてもいいです (do not have to)
    • Grammar focus on plan form Verb + と思います (to think)
